name: veogenie
description: Connect Codex to the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local VeoGenie desktop app from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds MCP tools that let Codex read and safely control the locally installed VeoGenie desktop app. The default configuration is read-only and connects through the app's installed veogenie-mcp.cmd launcher.
defaultPrompt: List VeoGenie pages and node counts.
Read the current VeoGenie media album.
